title: T-084 — E2E Playwright: schema admin wizard happy path (L2 add column + dry-run preview)
prompt:
# T-084 — E2E Playwright: schema admin wizard happy path (L2 add column + dry-run preview)

## Goal
E2E schema admin wizard add column.

Wizard target screen is SET-031 (column edit wizard) and must depend on T-097; SET-030/T-066 only provides browser entry/navigation.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/e2e/schema-wizard.spec.ts

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- L2 add column flow completes.
- Zod regen reflects new column.
- Concurrent edit detected.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write spec. GREEN: ensure UI + Zod regen wired.

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify L1 schema in this test path.
